title: Slime Bounce
description: Allows you to bounce on slime entities like the blocks, and also squash them to death doing it!
body:
# Slime Bounce
## Bounce on Slime mobs like on the blocks!


- Bounce on Slime entities like the slime blocks!
- Squash slimes by bouncing on them multiple times with enough velocity!
- Greatly configurable, per world.

![Slime Bouncing and Squashing](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b0d6b257ba6f5a2de4c131fe361539d566a4a0f2.gif)
